NFS.jql: project in (NFS) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

FCO.jql: project in (FCO) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

INC.jql: project in (INC) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

GL.jql: project in (GL) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status desc, Priority DESC

FAA.jql: project in (FAA) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC" asc, status desc, Priority DESC

P2P.jql: project in (P2P) AND issuetype in (Enhancement) AND fixVersion = N2026.R2 ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status desc, Priority DESC
